title: The Atlantic Monthly, Volume 13, No. 75, January, 1864: A Magazine of Literature, Art, and Politics
summaries: "The Atlantic Monthly, Volume 13, No. 75, January, 1864" by Various is a literary magazine written in the mid-19th century. Following this biography, the magazine transitions into a poem about planting an apple tree, symbolizing growth and legacy, alongside excerpts highlighting the challenges and humanity of various figures during turbulent times.
